```{r load-instruments}
# Load the instruments table and headline stats, from local ETL output when
# present (data/), otherwise from Redivis (requires REDIVIS_API_TOKEN).
suppressMessages({
  library(dplyr)
})

if (file.exists("data/instruments.parquet")) {
  instruments <- arrow::read_parquet("data/instruments.parquet")
  admins <- arrow::read_parquet("data/administrations.parquet")
} else {
  library(redivis)
  dataset <- redivis$organization("datapages")$dataset("wordbank")
  instruments <- dataset$table("instruments")$to_tibble()
  admins <- dataset$table("administrations")$to_tibble()
}

instruments <- instruments |> arrange(language, form)
stats <- list(
  n_administrations = nrow(admins),
  n_children = dplyr::n_distinct(admins$child_id),
  n_languages = dplyr::n_distinct(instruments$language),
  n_instruments = nrow(instruments)
)

# children per language; 3+-word names become initials (as on the old site)
lang_stats <- admins |>
  group_by(language) |>
  summarise(count = dplyr::n_distinct(child_id), .groups = "drop") |>
  mutate(name = ifelse(
    lengths(strsplit(language, " ")) > 2,
    vapply(strsplit(language, " "), \(p) paste(substr(p, 1, 1), collapse = ""), ""),
    language)) |>
  arrange(desc(count))

ojs_define(instruments = instruments)
ojs_define(stats = stats)
ojs_define(lang_stats = lang_stats)
```
